# Sikara Clinics Aesthetics & Dermatology : Best Skin & Hair Clinics in Hyderabad

[![salon in banjara hills](https://sp-ao.shortpixel.ai/client/to_auto,q_glossy,ret_img,w_800,h_524/https://sikaraclinics.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/store-front-view.webp)](https://sikaraclinics.com/store-locator/)

At Sikara Clinics, we are dedicated to bringing you the best in skin and hair care, focusing on results that enhance your natural beauty and boost your confidence. As a leading skin clinic, our facility is renowned for delivering personalised treatments that address your unique needs, whether it’s revitalising your skin or restoring the health of your hair.

We are proud to partner with Femina Flaunt, a prestigious venture by the Times of India Group. This collaboration allows us to offer our clients premium beauty and wellness services, combining the trusted legacy of Femina with our clinical expertise. Together, we’re redefining beauty care by merging advanced technology with a commitment to excellence at our skin and hair clinic.

At Sikara Clinics, we offer a comprehensive range of services, from cutting-edge dermatological treatments to advanced hair restoration procedures. As a premier skin and hair clinic, our team of experts is dedicated to ensuring that every client receives the highest level of care with treatments that are customised to meet your specific goals.

At Sikara Clinics, we believe in more than just treating your skin and hair – we believe in enhancing your overall well-being. As a leading skin clinic, we offer a comprehensive approach that goes beyond basic care, helping you achieve the confidence and radiance you deserve. Trust Sikara Clinics to be your partner in achieving a healthier, more vibrant you, and see why we are the top choice for skin and hair Clinic.

Book your appointment today and step into a world of advanced beauty care!

## Sirisha Alapati

![Shirisha CEO Sikara Clinics](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%201000'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

**Sirisha Alapati** is a visionary entrepreneur, leader, and advocate for women empowerment whose journey reflects resilience, purpose, and impact. With a strong educational background and professional experience in the United States, including work within federal government systems, she developed a global perspective and disciplined approach to leadership. These experiences shaped her mindset and laid the foundation for her entrepreneurial path.

Driven by a desire to create meaningful change, Sirisha returned to India with a mission to empower women and build purpose-driven businesses. She went on to establish multiple ventures focused on healthcare, beauty, and personal growth, creating platforms that combine quality, accessibility, and innovation. Her work is deeply rooted in the belief that confidence, independence, and opportunity can transform lives.

Her leadership style blends empathy with determination. She is known for building brands that stand for integrity, excellence, and long-term impact rather than short-term success. Through her initiatives, mentorship, and vision, she continues to inspire aspiring entrepreneurs, especially women, to pursue their ambitions with courage and clarity.

Today, Sirisha Alapati is recognized as a changemaker whose journey exemplifies how passion, purpose, and perseverance can come together to create lasting value for communities and future generations.

[Close](https://sikaraclinics.com/#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aclose%26settings%3DeyJkb19ub3Rfc2hvd19hZ2FpbiI6IiJ9)

## Kallem Raghavender Reddy

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%201000'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Kallem Raghavender Reddy is an accomplished entrepreneur with an MBA from the prestigious Badruka Institute of Management Studies. Raghavender began his career at Mahindra Satyam, where he honed his skills in business analysis, development, and operations management.

_Kallem Raghavender Reddy_‘s latest venture, Sikara Clinics, is a testament to his vision to redefine the wellness and aesthetics industry. Sikara Clinics is the result of a prestigious collaboration between Raghavender’s Sikara Health Sciences LLP and the renowned Femina Flaunt brand, an extension of the iconic Femina magazine under the Worldwide Media Pvt. Ltd. of the Times of India Group.

Sirisha Alapati

Sirisha Alapati is a visionary entrepreneur, leader, and advocate for women empowerment whose journey reflects resilience, purpose, and impact. With a strong educational background and professional experience in the United States, including work within federal government systems, she developed a global perspective and disciplined approach to leadership. These experiences shaped her mindset and laid the foundation for her entrepreneurial path.

Driven by a desire to create meaningful change, Sirisha returned to India with a mission to empower women and build purpose-driven businesses. She went on to establish multiple ventures focused on healthcare, beauty, and personal growth, creating platforms that combine quality, accessibility, and innovation. Her work is deeply rooted in the belief that confidence, independence, and opportunity can transform lives.

Her leadership style blends empathy with determination. She is known for building brands that stand for integrity, excellence, and long-term impact rather than short-term success. Through her initiatives, mentorship, and vision, she continues to inspire aspiring entrepreneurs, especially women, to pursue their ambitions with courage and clarity.

Today, Sirisha Alapati is recognized as a changemaker whose journey exemplifies how passion, purpose, and perseverance can come together to create lasting value for communities and future generations.

Kallem Raghavender Reddy

Kallem Raghavender Reddy is an accomplished entrepreneur with an MBA from the prestigious Badruka Institute of Management Studies. Raghavender began his career at Mahindra Satyam, where he honed his skills in business analysis, development, and operations management.

Kallem Raghavender Reddy‘s latest venture, Sikara Clinics, is a testament to his vision to redefine the wellness and aesthetics industry. Sikara Clinics is the result of a prestigious collaboration between Raghavender’s Sikara Health Sciences LLP and the renowned Femina Flaunt brand, an extension of the iconic Femina magazine under the Worldwide Media Pvt. Ltd. of the Times of India Group.
